calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:12am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk Jean Kong, D525, nothing reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Dean Poshard appears in pro per; respondents, Alexey Nititin and Ekatrina Volkova appears in pro per with counsel, Barry Tagawa. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.
Respondent's counsel, Barry Tagawa examins his client Mr. Nititin and cross-examin appellant, Dean Poshard.

EXR (A) ENDORSED STAMPED TRIAL BRIEF
EXR (B) WRITTEN DOCUMENT OF ALEXEY'S CONVERSATION WITH MATT TALBOT
EXR (C) PHOTO OF THE TILE IN THE BATHROOM WALL
EXR (D) ESTIMATE OF COST FOR REPLACEMENT FROM "ALL NATURAL STONE" AND OTHER COMPANIES

11:10am
Newly marked evidence is retained. Matter is submitted.
